title: I want to add a Slack message as an item on monday.com
excerpt:
Currently, monday.com does not have a Slack shortcut feature. 
It’s inefficient to copy and paste every time you add a monday.com item from your Slack message. 
Do you have a good idea?

posts.author: ttasaka (Takashi Tasaka)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, monday.com does not have a Slack shortcut feature.
It’s inefficient to copy and paste every time you add a monday.com item from your Slack message.
Do you have a good idea?

Turning a message in slack into an item in Monday.com:
